stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate the estimated Landing Mass at the destination for the Commercial flight.

Maximum structural take-off mass: 8350 kg
Maximum structural landing mass: 8350 kg
Zero Fuel Mass: 6210 kg
Taxi Fuel: 10 kg
Contingency Fuel: 90 kg
Alternate Fuel: 300 kg
Final Reserve Fuel: 400 kg
Trip Fuel: 780 kg
Extra fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
